ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event was held */,
  "competition_rules" TEXT /* Competition rules for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for athlete registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for athlete registration */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'National', 'Regional', 'Local') */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer who created the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "weight_class" REAL /* Weight class the athlete competes in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the athlete competes in (e.g., M_OEM_APF) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., Multi-ply, Raw) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the equipment was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who achieved the result */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the result */,
  "best_3_squat" REAL /* Best 3 squat achieved by the athlete */,
  "best_3_bench" REAL /* Best 3 bench achieved by the athlete */,
  "best_3_deadlift" REAL /* Best 3 deadlift achieved by the athlete */,
  "total" REAL /* Total weight lifted by the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "squat_1" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first squat attempt */,
  "squat_2" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second squat attempt */,
  "squat_3" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third squat attempt */,
  "bench_1" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first bench press attempt */,
  "bench_2" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second bench press attempt */,
  "bench_3" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third bench press attempt */,
  "deadlift_1" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_2" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_3" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third deadlift attempt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event organizer, judge, administrator, athlete) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Location where the event was held
